title: March 2022 OSU admin to-do — Marcella, CS advisor, JCEF, toiletries
html:
TL;DR

  • Four-line March 2022 to-do: talk to Marcella about getting out of arch hours, talk to CS advisor, finalize jcef paperwork, buy toiletries.
  • "Arch hours" most likely osu architecture elective hours Yahir was assigned as part of an early degree plan and wanted to drop — earliest in-vault sign of him steering away from non-CS coursework toward cs 161 / the CS major path.
  • Adds Marcella to the cast of OSU advisors / staff Yahir interfaced with in 2022 (alongside the unnamed CS advisor here and the financial-aid staff in 2022 05 02 dizzy financial aid).
  • jcef paperwork keeps recurring across the 2022 admin notes — 2022 05 06 to do osig flip phone also has a JCEF item.
  • Reads like the kind of note where one of the items is the "actual" stress (arch hours / advising change) and the other items are buffer.

Why it matters

Two graph-useful threads:

  1. Major-pivot signal. "Get out of arch hours" + "talk to CS advisor" in the same line items reads as Yahir actively re-routing his degree plan toward CS. This dates the cs major pivot commitment to spring 2022, before 2022 05 24 c not python cs161.
  2. Cast expansion. Marcella as a named OSU contact gets her into the entity graph; if she recurs (advising notes through 2023), promote.

Open questions

  • Who is Marcella? (Surname unknown — likely OSU advisor or jcef coordinator. Single mention so far; potential entity.)
  • Did the advising change go through? (Implied yes — Yahir is solidly on the CS track by 2022 05 24 c not python cs161.)

Wikilinks
